## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Chad Noland for SEO Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a services agency using AI workflows for content production, with a focus on human expertise in SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [The SEO Specialist role will provide high-level strategy across clients, conduct website audits, and stay current on SEO/GEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Chad has 13 years of SEO experience, including team leadership, technical SEO, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Discussion covered SEO strategies, client communication, and recent industry developments (e.g., LLMS.txt file)](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Overview

  - [Services agency using AI workflows for content production](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Values human expertise and review in content development](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Focuses on shaping marketing strategy for clients, including SEO and GEO](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Delivery org structured in pods for content production](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Positioning as thought leaders in SEO and GEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### SEO Specialist Role Description

  - [High-level strategy across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Conduct website audits and shape client direction](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Stay current on SEO/GEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Provide expertise on Google parameter changes and performance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Perform ad-hoc data analysis and make recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [May report to Andi (Customer Operations) or Jason (Head of Growth)](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

### Chad's Background and Experience

  - [13 years of SEO experience](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [8 years at web development agency, built SEO team from startup to established](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Professional writing and business management education](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Technical SEO expertise, including website development and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Experience managing 10-20 client accounts simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [IT support background from University of New Mexico](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### SEO Strategies and Client Management

  - [Use of tools like SEMrush for data gathering and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Focus on Google E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness)](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Balancing short-term wins (e.g., quick-ranking blog posts) with long-term KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Setting realistic expectations and celebrating early wins](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Adapting to changing client needs (e.g., product changes, terminology updates)](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Communicating SEO strategies to non-technical clients using relatable examples](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Recent SEO/GEO Developments

  - [LLMS.txt file for AI engine crawling and citation requests](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [SEMrush features for viewing AI search results and identifying AI-answered keywords](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Importance of schema markup for AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Trend towards more specific, niche content for LLM searches](https://fathom.video/share/yLGCWsSTdHvoc2h5USVJbM-V69ieRJdD?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Next Steps

  - Chad to await feedback on his interview performance
  - GrowthX to consider Chad's fit for the SEO Specialist role
  - Potential follow-up interview with Jason (Head of Growth) to be scheduled if moving forward
